column6: Current LF prox cards are W35-0, FC: 107

U006 is the original configuration (keyset) for UPS.  U006_2 was added as a configuration at a later date as UPS wanted a separate keyset for China offices.  When this_2 was added, we retroactively labelled U006 as U006_1 ...so U006 is the same as U006_1 and U006_2 is a separate keyset just for China UPS offices
